title: Kasam

title: Kasam Tere Pyaar Ki
subTitle: Pawan bumps into Diler at the ceremony, whom they had hired to kill Rishi. Reluctantly, Tanu agrees to get Pawan's initials with henna on her hand. Later, Tanu is shocked when she experiences a divine intervention, while praying to 'Kali Ma'.

title: Kasam Tere Pyaar Ki
subTitle: On Manpreet's request, Rishi and Tanu dance together, during which Rishi pleads her not leave him. Meanwhile, Diler circles around Rishi like a hunter behind prey. Later, Tanu bumps into Diler and she suspects there's something fishy going on.

title: Kasam Tere Pyaar Ki
subTitle: Tanu is restless as she fears for Rishi's life. Diler swings a knife at Rishi, but Tanu jumps in the way. Rishi chases Diler to find the mastermind behind the attack, but he escapes. Neha tries to take the credit for saving his life and lies to Bano.

title: Kasam Tere Pyaar Ki
subTitle: Tanu is declared safe by the doctor, but Rishi feels responsible for her state. He visits the 'Kaali Maa Mandir' where he meets a woman who tells him to marry no one but Tanu. He decides to marry Tanu the next day and tells her about it.
